title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving platform stability and preventing common setup issues. OpsPal now automatically detects and prevents field conflicts when Salesforce Dynamic Forms are active, eliminates permission errors when creating record types, and automatically resolves missing dependencies that could cause sessions to fail.

entries.headline: Prevents field conflicts and permission errors in Salesforce
details: OpsPal now detects when Dynamic Forms are active and prevents adding fields that would become invisible
Automatically assigns proper permissions to System Administrator when creating new record types
Converts blocking routing conflicts into warnings so your sessions continue running smoothly

entries.headline: Automatically fixes missing dependencies at startup
details: OpsPal now detects and installs missing components automatically when you start a session
Shows clear error messages and fix instructions when automatic installation fails
